CustomField.formula: HYPERLINK( "http://bewerbungen.brandleadership.ch/lead?campaign="&Id &"&unit="& IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "BLC"), "BLC", IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "BY"), "BY", IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "GBCH"), "GBCH", IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "GBUS"), "GBUS", IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "GCH"), "GCH", IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "HBC"), "HBC", IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "HYS"), "HYS", IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "KNO"), "KNO", IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "MA"), "MA", IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "ON"), "ON", IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "SE"), "SE", IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "SC"), "SC", IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "VH"), "VH", IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "SVH"), "SVH", IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "CY"), "CY", IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "XB"), "XB ", NULL)))))))))))))))) , "Click this link")
CustomField.label: URL Application Form
